[38;5;59m│[39m [48;5;58m    dex.DexReference) [38;5;153mint[39m {[49m                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m159[39m      [38;5;153mif[39m reference1 == [38;5;153mnil[39m && reference2 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m      == [38;5;153mnil[39m {                               [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m160[39m           [38;5;153mreturn[39m [38;5;151m0[39m                      [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m161[39m       }                                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mEdit[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/.../compare_to_visitor.go: f[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m441[39m       [38;5;153mreturn[39m s                          [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m442[39m   }                                     [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;103m443[39m                                         [38;5;59m│[39m

[38;5;59m│[39m [48;5;52m    DexReference) StructuralSpecification {[49m [38;5;59m│[39m

 [38;5;218m⠏[39m [3mNavigating the slime mold…[0m [38;5;103m(esc to cancel, 3m 35

 ? for shortcuts [39m
[38;5;59m───────────────────────────────────────────────────

[30m[48;5;234m▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀
[39m [38;5;217m* [39m남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은
   것부터 진행해보자.
   clean architecture, single responsibility
   principle, interface-oriented programming
   관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난 부분을
   개선하자.
   s/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고
   결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성
   측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.

[30m▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄
[39m[49m /workspace/tmp         [38;5;217mno[39m             [38;5;103m/model [39mAuto
 [38;5;103m(4aa08788a4*)[39m          [38;5;217msandbox[39m        (Gemini 3)
